{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = The Thousand Blood Elixir
| introduced = Waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Thousand Blood Elixir]] is distilled from a thousand powerful [[sacred beasts]] to allow a [[Sage]] to match a [[Herald]]'s strength temporarily.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“The Thousand Blood Elixir,” Lindon introduced. “Distilled from a thousand of the most physically powerful sacred beasts, condensed and refined to let a Sage artificially match a Herald in strength.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
